summary: The prune DB extension divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in pruning loop break expressions; no pruning behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 252: M	crates/prune/prune/src/db_ext.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to `break`, `break false`, and `break true` loop expressions.
No pruning limit handling, cursor seek behavior, range pruning, or completion result behavior changed.
